Paul Hyland Principal Product Management Consultant HIGHER DIGITAL, consultancy focused guiding higher education institutions through challenge digital transformation.
specializes product management, user experience, software development.
Previously, Paul spent over decade overseeing infrastructure software development Editorial Projects Education, which publishes Education Week, leading news source covering K-12 education United States.
software team developed content management, registration, access control systems, integrated these with external subscription fulfillment, advertising, analytics, social media, mobile services.
Paul also spent several years overseeing design, editing, production; orchestrated video livestreaming conferences; wrote articles blog posts about educational technology data security.
Paul B.S.
Electrical Engineering from Yale University, M.A.
Science, Technology Public Policy from George Washington University.
long-time member Association Computing Machinery (ACM), serves U.S. Public Policy Council (USACM), chairing Intellectual Property Committee, co-chairing Data Working Group.
